title: Jim Woodring

'''Jim Woodring''' (born [[October 11]], [[1950s|1952]]) has worked as a ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] author. He wrote the comics "[[Life, Death, and the Living Force]]," ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Gaar Suppoon Hit]]'', ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Hunger of Princess Nampi]]'', ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]'', and ''[[Jabba the Hutt: Betrayal]]''.

{{Bio-stub}}
